mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, mechanically compressing equity valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the labor market signals imminent recession risk, triggering institutional risk-off rebalancing and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in consumer credit outstanding and housing starts confirms robust aggregate demand, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal fires but SPX 60-day forward returns are negative in more than half of observed instances.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production in a supply-constrained environment indicates successful capacity utilization and operating leverage, directly expanding profit margins and generating positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO rises for three consecutive months while SPX 5-day forward returns remain negative in > 70% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating headline inflation forces market pricing of tighter monetary policy, increasing the equity risk premium and discount rates, which depresses S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL exceeds the threshold but SPX 20-day forward returns are positive in > 65% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Strong nonfarm payrolls growth combined with a stable unemployment rate confirms a healthy labor demand equilibrium, sustaining consumer spending and driving positive medium-term equity returns.
failure_condition: PAYEMS rises and UNRATE falls or stabilizes, yet SPX 60-day forward returns are negative in > 55% of observed windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained quarterly GDP growth expands the corporate earnings base, directly supporting positive long-horizon equity returns through fundamental valuation anchors and dividend growth expectations.
failure_condition: GDPC1 shows positive quarter-over-quarter growth for four consecutive periods while SPX 60-day forward returns remain negative.

mechanism_narrative: When housing demand is robust and policy rates are accommodative, the real estate sector acts as a leading indicator for broader economic momentum, driving positive short-term equity returns.
regime_hint: accommodative monetary policy with strong housing
failure_condition: Both housing starts exceed 1400 and funds rate stays below 2.0% for two consecutive months, yet SPX 20-day forward returns are negative in > 60% of instances.
